bullets.text: Combined ratio of 92.7 reflected good margins across all business segments; the quarter was described as a refreshing contrast to the headlines of a year ago.
Q3 produced the strongest new personal auto application growth in some time; Agency new applications were up ~7% year-over-year, the first step toward restoring Agency policy count growth.

Direct personal auto policies in force grew 13% year-over-year with even stronger new application gains; Direct represented ~42% of personal auto customers and progressive.com earned Keynote's #1 insurance website for the 6th consecutive period.
Capital position increased meaningfully during the quarter; investment returns rebounded; the portfolio composition had a significantly lower risk profile than Q3 2008.
Bodily injury and PIP claim frequency was up for the year but comparable to 2007; collision frequency was lower; accurate estimation of future PIP severity remained a primary challenge.
Claims staffing changes from Q2, combined with maturing process improvements, produced run-rate LAE declines of one point on overall expense while maintaining settlement quality gains.
Name Your Price continued rolling out; Direct auto web site earned Forrester Research's best Brand Building Web site designation across all financial services sectors.

Personal auto policy life expectancies were ~2% higher Agency and ~5% higher Direct versus a year ago; nearly 11.5 million customers served with multi-year retention focus remaining a critical objective.
